revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:October 6 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of October 6 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦10月6日'''は[[旧暦]][[10月 (旧暦)|10月]]の6日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[皇極天皇]]2年（[[643年]]_月_日） - 蘇我蝦夷が子・入鹿に勝手に紫冠を授け大臣とする * [[治承]]4年（[[1180年]]_月_日） - 安房に逃れた[[源朝頼]]が、千葉常胤らの助勢を得て鎌倉に入る * [[天保]]13年（[[1842年]]_月_日） - 江戸幕府が[[二宮尊徳]]を利根川の水利土木調査の為の御普請役格に登用
== 誕生日 == * （[[1760年]]_月_日） - [[嘉慶帝]]、[[清]]の7代皇帝（+ [[1820年]]） * （[[1866年]][[11月12日]]） - [[孫文]]、中国革命家，中華民国大総統（+ [[1925年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[正徳]]5年（[[1715年]][[11月1日]]） - [[渋川春海]]（2代目安井算哲）、天文暦学者（* [[1639年]]） * [[延享]]4年（[[1747年]]_月_日） - [[寺坂信行|寺坂吉右衛門信行]]、[[赤穂浪士]]（* [[1665年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[10月5日 (旧暦)|10月5日]] 翌日[[10月7日 (旧暦)|10月7日]] - 前月[[9月6日 (旧暦)|9月6日]] 翌月[[11月6日 (旧暦)|11月6日]] *新暦[[10月6日]]
{{msg:stub}}

== できごと == * [[皇極天皇]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[643年]][[11月22日]]） - [[蘇我蝦夷]]が子・[[蘇我入鹿|入鹿]]に勝手に紫冠を授け大臣とする * [[治承]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1180年]][[10月26日]]） - 安房に逃れた[[源朝頼]]が、[[千葉常胤]]らの助勢を得て鎌倉に入る * [[天保]]13年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1842年]][[11月8日]]） - 江戸幕府が[[二宮尊徳]]を利根川の水利土木調査の為の御普請役格に登用
== 誕生日 == * [[乾隆]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1760年]][[11月13日]]） - [[嘉慶帝]]、[[清]]の7代皇帝（+ [[1820年]]） * [[同治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1866年]][[11月12日]]） - [[孫文]]、革命家・[[中華民国]]大総統（+ [[1925年]]）

== 誕生日 == * [[乾隆]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1760年]][[11月13日]]） - [[嘉慶帝]]、[[清]]の7代皇帝（+ [[1820年]]） * [[天保]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1831年]][[11月9日]]） - [[小野五平]]、将棋の十二世名人 * [[同治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1866年]][[11月12日]]） - [[孫文]]、革命家・[[中華民国]]大総統（+ [[1925年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天正]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1584年]][[11月8日]]） - [[蘆名盛隆]]、[[戦国大名]]（* [[1561年]]） * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1715年]][[11月1日]]） - [[渋川春海]]（2代目安井算哲）、天文暦学者（* [[1639年]]） * [[延享]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1747年]][[11月8日]]） - [[寺坂信行|寺坂吉右衛門信行]]、[[赤穂浪士]]（* [[1665年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|5|10|7|9|6|11|10|1006}}
[[ko:음력 10월 6일]] [[zh:十月初六]] [[zh-yue:十月初六]]

== 誕生日 == * [[乾隆]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1760年]][[11月13日]]） - [[嘉慶帝]]、[[清]]の7代皇帝（+ [[1820年]]） * [[天保]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1831年]][[11月9日]]） - [[小野五平]]、将棋の十二世名人 * [[同治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1866年]][[11月12日]]） - [[孫文]]、革命家・[[中華民国]]大総統（+ [[1925年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天正]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1584年]][[11月8日]]） - [[蘆名盛隆]]、[[戦国大名]]（* [[1561年]]） * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1715年]][[11月1日]]） - [[渋川春海]]（2代目安井算哲）、天文暦学者（* [[1639年]]） * [[延享]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1747年]][[11月8日]]） - [[寺坂信行]]、[[赤穂浪士]]（* [[1665年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|5|10|7|9|6|11|10|1006}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:10月6日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]]

== 誕生日 == * [[乾隆]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1760年]][[11月13日]]） - [[嘉慶帝]]、[[清]]の7代皇帝（+ [[1820年]]） * [[天保]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1831年]][[11月9日]]） - [[小野五平]]、将棋の十二世名人 * [[同治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1866年]][[11月12日]]） - [[孫文]]、革命家・[[中華民国]]大総統（+ [[1925年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天正]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1584年]][[11月8日]]） - [[蘆名盛隆]]、[[戦国大名]]（* [[1561年]]） * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1715年]][[11月1日]]） - [[渋川春海]]（2代目安井算哲）、天文暦学者（* [[1639年]]） * [[延享]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1747年]][[11月8日]]） - [[寺坂信行]]、[[赤穂浪士]]（* [[1665年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|5|10|7|9|6|11|10|1006}}
[[Category:japanese Lunar Calendar]][[ja:10月6日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunar October]] {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}}

{{Lunar October}} '''October 6 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
<!--== {{Lunar October}} ''October 6 (Old Lunar Calendar)<!--Lunar October6-->きゅうれきじゅうがつむいか）は[[10月 (旧暦)|Lunar October]]の6日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]][[Category:先負]]である。
--> == Events == * [[斉明天皇|皇極天皇]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[643年]][[11月22日]]） - [[蘇我蝦夷]]が子・[[蘇我入鹿|入鹿]]に勝手に紫冠を授け大臣とする * [[治承]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1180年]][[10月26日]]） - [[安房国|安房]]に逃れた[[源頼朝]]が、[[千葉常胤]]らの助勢を得て鎌倉に入る * [[天保]]13年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1842年]][[11月8日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が[[二宮尊徳]]を利根川の水利土木調査の為の御普請役格に登用
== Births == * [[乾隆]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1760年]][[11月13日]]） - [[嘉慶帝]]、[[清]]の7代皇帝（+ [[1820年]]） * [[天保]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1831年]][[11月9日]]） - [[小野五平]]、将棋の十二世名人 * [[同治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1866年]][[11月12日]]） - [[孫文]]、革命家・[[中華民国]]大総統（+ [[1925年]]）
== Deaths == * [[天正]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1584年]][[11月8日]]） - [[蘆名盛隆]]、[[戦国大名]]（* [[1561年]]） * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1715年]][[11月1日]]） - [[渋川春海]]（2代目安井算哲）、天文暦学者（* [[1639年]]） * [[延享]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1747年]][[11月8日]]） - [[寺坂信行]]、[[赤穂浪士]]（* [[1665年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|5|10|7|9|6|11|10|1006}}

== Deaths == * [[天正]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1584年]][[11月8日]]） - [[蘆名盛隆]]、[[戦国大名]]（* [[1561年]]） * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1715年]][[11月1日]]） - [[渋川春海]]（2代目安井算哲）、天文暦学者（* [[1639年]]） * [[延享]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1747年]][[11月8日]]） - [[寺坂信行]]、[[赤穂浪士]]（* [[1665年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{旧暦360日|10|5|10|7|9|6|11|10|1006}}

revision.text:
[[sn:October 6 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初六]] [[zh:十月初六]] [[en:draft:October 6 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events ==
* {{ill|Empress Kōgyoku|ja|皇極天皇}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|643|ja|643年}} {{ill|November 22|ja|11月22日}}) – {{ill|Soga no Emishi|ja|蘇我蝦夷}} arbitrarily grants the {{ill|purple cap|ja|紫冠}} to his son, {{ill|Soga no Iruka|ja|蘇我入鹿}}, making him Minister.
* {{ill|Jishō (era)|ja|治承}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}}) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}}, having fled to {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国}}, enters {{ill|Kamakura|ja|鎌倉}} with the assistance of {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤}} and others.
* {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 13 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1842|ja|1842年}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}}) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} appoints {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} to oversee hydraulic and civil engineering surveys of the {{ill|Tone River|ja|利根川}}.
== Births ==
* {{ill|Qianlong Emperor|ja|乾隆}} 10 (Gregorian {{ill|1760|ja|1760年}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}}) – {{ill|Jiaqing Emperor|ja|嘉慶帝}}, 7th Emperor of the {{ill|Qing dynasty|ja|清}} (+ {{ill|1820|ja|1820年}}).
* {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1831|ja|1831年}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}}) – {{ill|Ono Gohei|ja|小野五平}}, 12th {{ill|Meijin (shogi)|ja|名人}} in shogi.
* {{ill|Tongzhi Emperor|ja|同治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1866|ja|1866年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}}) – {{ill|Sun Yat-sen|ja|孫文}}, revolutionary and first {{ill|Provisional President of the Republic of China|ja|中華民国大総統}} (+ {{ill|1925|ja|1925年}}).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Tenshō (Japan)|ja|天正}} 12 (Gregorian {{ill|1584|ja|1584年}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}}) – {{ill|Ashina Moritaka|ja|蘆名盛隆}}, {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名}} (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561年}}).
* {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|ja|正徳}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1715|ja|1715年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}}) – {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}}, also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲}}, astronomer and calendrical scholar (* {{ill|1639|ja|1639年}}).
* {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|延享}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}}) – {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行}}, one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士}} (* {{ill|1665|ja|1665年}}).
== Commemorations ==

* {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 13 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1842|ja|1842年}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}}) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} appoints {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} to oversee hydraulic and civil engineering surveys of the {{ill|Tone River|ja|利根川}}.

* {{ill|Qianlong Emperor|ja|乾隆}} 10 (Gregorian {{ill|1760|ja|1760年}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}}) – {{ill|Jiaqing Emperor|ja|嘉慶帝}}, 7th Emperor of the {{ill|Qing dynasty|ja|清}} (+ {{ill|1820|ja|1820年}}).
* {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1831|ja|1831年}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}}) – {{ill|Ono Gohei|ja|小野五平}}, 12th {{ill|Meijin (shogi)|ja|名人}} in shogi.
* {{ill|Tongzhi Emperor|ja|同治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1866|ja|1866年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}}) – {{ill|Sun Yat-sen|ja|孫文}}, revolutionary and first {{ill|Provisional President of the Republic of China|ja|中華民国大総統}} (+ {{ill|1925|ja|1925年}}).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Tenshō (Japan)|ja|天正}} 12 (Gregorian {{ill|1584|ja|1584年}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}}) – {{ill|Ashina Moritaka|ja|蘆名盛隆}}, {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名}} (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561年}}).

* {{ill|Qianlong Emperor|ja|乾隆}} 10 (Gregorian {{ill|1760|ja|1760年}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}}) – {{ill|Jiaqing Emperor|ja|嘉慶帝}}, 7th Emperor of the {{ill|Qing dynasty|ja|清}} (+ {{ill|1820|ja|1820年}}).
* {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1831|ja|1831年}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}}) – {{ill|Ono Gohei|ja|小野五平}}, 12th {{ill|Meijin (shogi)|ja|名人}} in shogi.
* {{ill|Tongzhi Emperor|ja|同治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1866|ja|1866年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}}) – {{ill|Sun Yat-sen|ja|孫文}}, revolutionary and first {{ill|Provisional President of the Republic of China|ja|中華民国大総統}} (+ {{ill|1925|ja|1925年}}).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Tenshō (Japan)|ja|天正}} 12 (Gregorian {{ill|1584|ja|1584年}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}}) – {{ill|Ashina Moritaka|ja|蘆名盛隆}}, {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名}} (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561年}}).
* {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|ja|正徳}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1715|ja|1715年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}}) – {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}}, also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲}}, astronomer and calendrical scholar (* {{ill|1639|ja|1639年}}).
* {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|延享}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}}) – {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行}}, one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士}} (* {{ill|1665|ja|1665年}}).

[[sn:October 6 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 6일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初六]] [[zh:十月初六]] [[en:draft:October 6 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events ==
* {{ill|Empress Kōgyoku|ja|皇極天皇}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|643|ja|643年}} {{ill|November 22|ja|11月22日}}) – {{ill|Soga no Emishi|ja|蘇我蝦夷}} arbitrarily grants the {{ill|purple cap|ja|紫冠}} to his son, {{ill|Soga no Iruka|ja|蘇我入鹿}}, making him Minister.
* {{ill|Jishō (era)|ja|治承}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}}) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}}, having fled to {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国}}, enters {{ill|Kamakura|ja|鎌倉}} with the assistance of {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤}} and others.
* {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 13 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1842|ja|1842年}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}}) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} appoints {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} to oversee hydraulic and civil engineering surveys of the {{ill|Tone River|ja|利根川}}.
== Births ==
* {{ill|Qianlong Emperor|ja|乾隆}} 10 (Gregorian {{ill|1760|ja|1760年}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}}) – {{ill|Jiaqing Emperor|ja|嘉慶帝}}, 7th Emperor of the {{ill|Qing dynasty|ja|清}} (+ {{ill|1820|ja|1820年}}).
* {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1831|ja|1831年}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}}) – {{ill|Ono Gohei|ja|小野五平}}, 12th {{ill|Meijin (shogi)|ja|名人}} in shogi.
* {{ill|Tongzhi Emperor|ja|同治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1866|ja|1866年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}}) – {{ill|Sun Yat-sen|ja|孫文}}, revolutionary and first {{ill|Provisional President of the Republic of China|ja|中華民国大総統}} (+ {{ill|1925|ja|1925年}}).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Tenshō (Japan)|ja|天正}} 12 (Gregorian {{ill|1584|ja|1584年}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}}) – {{ill|Ashina Moritaka|ja|蘆名盛隆}}, {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名}} (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561年}}).
* {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|ja|正徳}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1715|ja|1715年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}}) – {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}}, also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲}}, astronomer and calendrical scholar (* {{ill|1639|ja|1639年}}).
* {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|延享}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}}) – {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行}}, one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士}} (* {{ill|1665|ja|1665年}}).

[[sn:October 6 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 6일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初六]] [[zh:十月初六]] [[en:draft:October 6 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Empress Kōgyoku|ja|皇極天皇}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|643|ja|643年}} {{ill|November 22|ja|11月22日}}) – {{ill|Soga no Emishi|ja|蘇我蝦夷}} arbitrarily grants the {{ill|purple cap|ja|紫冠}} to his son, {{ill|Soga no Iruka|ja|蘇我入鹿}}, making him Minister. * {{ill|Jishō (era)|ja|治承}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}}) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}}, having fled to {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国}}, enters {{ill|Kamakura|ja|鎌倉}} with the assistance of {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤}} and others. * {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 13 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1842|ja|1842年}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}}) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} appoints {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} to oversee hydraulic and civil engineering surveys of the {{ill|Tone River|ja|利根川}}. == Births == * {{ill|Qianlong Emperor|ja|乾隆}} 10 (Gregorian {{ill|1760|ja|1760年}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}}) – {{ill|Jiaqing Emperor|ja|嘉慶帝}}, 7th Emperor of the {{ill|Qing dynasty|ja|清}} (+ {{ill|1820|ja|1820年}}). * {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1831|ja|1831年}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}}) – {{ill|Ono Gohei|ja|小野五平}}, 12th {{ill|Meijin (shogi)|ja|名人}} in shogi. * {{ill|Tongzhi Emperor|ja|同治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1866|ja|1866年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}}) – {{ill|Sun Yat-sen|ja|孫文}}, revolutionary and first {{ill|Provisional President of the Republic of China|ja|中華民国大総統}} (+ {{ill|1925|ja|1925年}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Japan)|ja|天正}} 12 (Gregorian {{ill|1584|ja|1584年}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}}) – {{ill|Ashina Moritaka|ja|蘆名盛隆}}, {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名}} (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561年}}). * {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|ja|正徳}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1715|ja|1715年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}}) – {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}}, also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲}}, astronomer and calendrical scholar (* {{ill|1639|ja|1639年}}). * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|延享}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}}) – {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行}}, one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士}} (* {{ill|1665|ja|1665年}}). == [[sn:October 6 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 6일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初六]] [[zh:十月初六]] [[en:draft:October 6 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Empress Kōgyoku|ja|皇極天皇}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|643|ja|643年}} {{ill|November 22|ja|11月22日}}) – {{ill|Soga no Emishi|ja|蘇我蝦夷}} arbitrarily grants the {{ill|purple cap|ja|紫冠}} to his son, {{ill|Soga no Iruka|ja|蘇我入鹿}}, making him Minister. * {{ill|Jishō (era)|ja|治承}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}}) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}}, having fled to {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国}}, enters {{ill|Kamakura|ja|鎌倉}} with the assistance of {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤}} and others. * {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 13 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1842|ja|1842年}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}}) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} appoints {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} to oversee hydraulic and civil engineering surveys of the {{ill|Tone River|ja|利根川}}. == Births == * {{ill|Qianlong Emperor|ja|乾隆}} 10 (Gregorian {{ill|1760|ja|1760年}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}}) – {{ill|Jiaqing Emperor|ja|嘉慶帝}}, 7th Emperor of the {{ill|Qing dynasty|ja|清}} (+ {{ill|1820|ja|1820年}}). * {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1831|ja|1831年}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}}) – {{ill|Ono Gohei|ja|小野五平}}, 12th {{ill|Meijin (shogi)|ja|名人}} in shogi. * {{ill|Tongzhi Emperor|ja|同治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1866|ja|1866年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}}) – {{ill|Sun Yat-sen|ja|孫文}}, revolutionary and first {{ill|Provisional President of the Republic of China|ja|中華民国大総統}} (+ {{ill|1925|ja|1925年}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Japan)|ja|天正}} 12 (Gregorian {{ill|1584|ja|1584年}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}}) – {{ill|Ashina Moritaka|ja|蘆名盛隆}}, {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名}} (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561年}}). * {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|ja|正徳}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1715|ja|1715年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}}) – {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}}, also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲}}, astronomer and calendrical scholar (* {{ill|1639|ja|1639年}}). * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|延享}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}}) – {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行}}, one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士}} (* {{ill|1665|ja|1665年}}). == Commemorations == [[Category:Japanese historical events]] [[Category:Edo period]] [[Category:Shogunate officials]] [[Category:Sengoku period]] [[Category:Samurai]] [[Category:Republic of China]] [[sn:October 6 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 6일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初六]] [[zh:十月初六]] [[en:draft:October 6 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Empress Kōgyoku|ja|皇極天皇}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|643|ja|643年}} {{ill|November 22|ja|11月22日}} ) – {{ill|Soga no Emishi|ja|蘇我蝦夷}} arbitrarily grants the {{ill|purple cap|ja|紫冠}} to his son, {{ill|Soga no Iruka|ja|蘇我入鹿}} , making him Minister. * {{ill|Jishō (era)|ja|治承}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} , having fled to {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国}} , enters {{ill|Kamakura|ja|鎌倉}} with the assistance of {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤}} and others. * {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 13 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1842|ja|1842年}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} appoints {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} to oversee hydraulic and civil engineering surveys of the {{ill|Tone River|ja|利根川}} . == Births == * {{ill|Qianlong Emperor|ja|乾隆}} 10 (Gregorian {{ill|1760|ja|1760年}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ) – {{ill|Jiaqing Emperor|ja|嘉慶帝}} , 7th Emperor of the {{ill|Qing dynasty|ja|清}} (+ {{ill|1820|ja|1820年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1831|ja|1831年}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – {{ill|Ono Gohei|ja|小野五平}} , 12th {{ill|Meijin (shogi)|ja|名人}} in shogi. * {{ill|Tongzhi Emperor|ja|同治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1866|ja|1866年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Sun Yat-sen|ja|孫文}} , revolutionary and first {{ill|Provisional President of the Republic of China|ja|中華民国大総統}} (+ {{ill|1925|ja|1925年}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Japan)|ja|天正}} 12 (Gregorian {{ill|1584|ja|1584年}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ) – {{ill|Ashina Moritaka|ja|蘆名盛隆}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名}} (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561年}} ). * {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|ja|正徳}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1715|ja|1715年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}} , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* {{ill|1639|ja|1639年}} ). * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|延享}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ) – {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士}} (* {{ill|1665|ja|1665年}} ). == Commemorations == [[Category:Japanese historical events]] [[Category:Edo period]] [[Category:Shogunate officials]] [[Category:Sengoku period]] [[Category:Samurai]] [[Category:Republic of China]] [[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:蘇我入鹿の紫冠授与]] == See Also ==

Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} , having fled to {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国}} , enters {{ill|Kamakura|ja|鎌倉}} with the assistance of {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤}} and others. * {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 13 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1842|ja|1842年}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} appoints {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} to oversee hydraulic and civil engineering surveys of the {{ill|Tone River|ja|利根川}} . == Births == * {{ill|Qianlong Emperor|ja|乾隆}} 10 (Gregorian {{ill|1760|ja|1760年}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ) – {{ill|Jiaqing Emperor|ja|嘉慶帝}} , 7th Emperor of the {{ill|Qing dynasty|ja|清}} (+ {{ill|1820|ja|1820年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1831|ja|1831年}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – {{ill|Ono Gohei|ja|小野五平}} , 12th {{ill|Meijin (shogi)|ja|名人}} in shogi. * {{ill|Tongzhi Emperor|ja|同治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1866|ja|1866年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Sun Yat-sen|ja|孫文}} , revolutionary and first {{ill|Provisional President of the Republic of China|ja|中華民国大総統}} (+ {{ill|1925|ja|1925年}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Japan)|ja|天正}} 12 (Gregorian {{ill|1584|ja|1584年}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ) – {{ill|Ashina Moritaka|ja|蘆名盛隆}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名}} (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561年}} ). * {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|ja|正徳}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1715|ja|1715年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}} , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* {{ill|1639|ja|1639年}} ). * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|延享}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ) – {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士}} (* {{ill|1665|ja|1665年}} ). == Commemorations == [[Category:Japanese historical events]] [[Category:Edo period]] [[Category:Shogunate officials]] [[Category:Sengoku period]] [[Category:Samurai]] [[Category:Republic of China]] revision.text:
[[sn:October 6 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 6일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初六]] [[zh:十月初六]] [[en:draft:October 6 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Empress Kōgyoku|ja|皇極天皇}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|643|ja|643年}} {{ill|November 22|ja|11月22日}} ) – {{ill|Soga no Emishi|ja|蘇我蝦夷}} arbitrarily grants the {{ill|purple cap|ja|紫冠}} to his son, {{ill|Soga no Iruka|ja|蘇我入鹿}} , making him Minister. * {{ill|Jishō (era)|ja|治承}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} , having fled to {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国}} , enters {{ill|Kamakura|ja|鎌倉}} with the assistance of {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤}} and others. * {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 13 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1842|ja|1842年}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} appoints {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} to oversee hydraulic and civil engineering surveys of the {{ill|Tone River|ja|利根川}} . == Births == * {{ill|Qianlong Emperor|ja|乾隆}} 10 (Gregorian {{ill|1760|ja|1760年}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ) – {{ill|Jiaqing Emperor|ja|嘉慶帝}} , 7th Emperor of the {{ill|Qing dynasty|ja|清}} (+ {{ill|1820|ja|1820年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1831|ja|1831年}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – {{ill|Ono Gohei|ja|小野五平}} , 12th {{ill|Meijin (shogi)|ja|名人}} in shogi. * {{ill|Tongzhi Emperor|ja|同治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1866|ja|1866年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Sun Yat-sen|ja|孫文}} , revolutionary and first {{ill|Provisional President of the Republic of China|ja|中華民国大総統}} (+ {{ill|1925|ja|1925年}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Japan)|ja|天正}} 12 (Gregorian {{ill|1584|ja|1584年}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ) – {{ill|Ashina Moritaka|ja|蘆名盛隆}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名}} (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561年}} ). * {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|ja|正徳}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1715|ja|1715年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}} , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* {{ill|1639|ja|1639年}} ). * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|延享}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ) – {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士}} (* {{ill|1665|ja|1665年}} ). == Commemorations == [[Category:Japanese historical events]] [[Category:Edo period]] [[Category:Shogunate officials]] [[Category:Sengoku period]] [[Category:Samurai]] [[Category:Republic of China]] [[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:蘇我入鹿の紫冠授与]] == See Also ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .

civil engineering surveys of the {{ill|Tone River|ja|利根川}} . == Births == * {{ill|Qianlong Emperor|ja|乾隆}} 10 (Gregorian {{ill|1760|ja|1760年}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ) – {{ill|Jiaqing Emperor|ja|嘉慶帝}} , 7th Emperor of the {{ill|Qing dynasty|ja|清}} (+ {{ill|1820|ja|1820年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1831|ja|1831年}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – {{ill|Ono == Events == * {{ill|Empress Kōgyoku|ja|皇極天皇}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|643|ja|643年}} {{ill|November 22|ja|11月22日}} ) – {{ill|Soga no Emishi|ja|蘇我蝦夷}} arbitrarily grants the {{ill|purple cap|ja|紫冠}} to his son, {{ill|Soga no Iruka|ja|蘇我入鹿}} , making him Minister. * {{ill|Jishō (era)|ja|治承}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} , having fled to {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国}} , enters {{ill|Kamakura|ja|鎌倉}} with the assistance of {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤}} and others. * {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 13 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1842|ja|1842年}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|ja|江戸幕府}} appoints {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} to oversee hydraulic and civil engineering surveys of the {{ill|Tone River|ja|利根川}} . == Births == * {{ill|Qianlong Emperor|ja|乾隆}} 10 (Gregorian {{ill|1760|ja|1760年}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ) – {{ill|Jiaqing Emperor|ja|嘉慶帝}} , 7th Emperor of the {{ill|Qing dynasty|ja|清}} (+ {{ill|1820|ja|1820年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1831|ja|1831年}} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – {{ill|Ono Gohei|ja|小野五平}} , 12th {{ill|Meijin (shogi)|ja|名人}} in shogi. * {{ill|Tongzhi Emperor|ja|同治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1866|ja|1866年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Sun Yat-sen|ja|孫文}} , revolutionary and first {{ill|Provisional President of the Republic of China|ja|中華民国大総統}} (+ {{ill|1925|ja|1925年}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Japan)|ja|天正}} 12 (Gregorian {{ill|1584|ja|1584年}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ) – {{ill|Ashina Moritaka|ja|蘆名盛隆}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名}} (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561年}} ). * {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|ja|正徳}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1715|ja|1715年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}} , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* {{ill|1639|ja|1639年}} ). * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|延享}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ) – {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士}} (* {{ill|1665|ja|1665年}} ). == Commemorations == [[Category:Japanese historical events]] [[Category:Edo period]] [[Category:Shogunate officials]] [[Category:Sengoku period]] [[Category:Samurai]] [[Category:Republic of China]] == Events == * {{ill|Empress Kōgyoku|ja|皇極天皇}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|643|ja|643年}} {{ill|November 22|ja|11月22日}} ) – {{ill|Soga no Emishi|ja|蘇我Ezo}} arbitrarily grants the {{ill|purple cap|ja|紫冠}} to his son, {{ill|Soga no Iruka|ja|蘇我入鹿}} , making him Minister. * {{ill|Jishō (era)|ja|治承}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no hydraulic and civil engineering surveys of the {{ill|Tone River|ja|利根川}} . == Births == * {{ill|Qianlong Emperor|ja|乾隆}} 10 (Gregorian {{ill|1760|ja|1760年}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ) – {{ill|Ono Gohei|ja|小野五平}} , 12th {{ill|Meijin (shogi)|ja|名人}} in shogi. * {{ill|Tongzhi Emperor|ja|同治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1866|ja|1866年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Sun Yat-sen|ja|孫文}} , revolutionary and first {{ill|Provisional President of the Republic of China|ja|中華民国大総統}} (+ {{ill|1925|ja|1925年}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Japan)|ja|天正}} 12 (Gregorian {{ill|1584|ja|1584年}} [[sn:October 6 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 6일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初六]] [[zh:十月初六]] [[en:draft:October 6 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Empress Kōgyoku|ja|皇極天皇}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|643|ja|643年}} {{ill|November 22|ja|11月22日}} ) – {{ill|Soga no Emishi|ja|蘇我Ezo}} arbitrarily grants the {{ill|purple cap|ja|紫冠}} to his son, {{ill|Soga no Iruka|ja|蘇我入鹿}} , making him Minister. * {{ill|Jishō (era)|ja|治承}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1180|ja|1180年}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} , having fled to {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国}} , enters {{ill|Kamakura|ja|鎌倉}} with the assistance of {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤}} and others. * {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 13 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1842|ja|1842nd year }} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} appoints {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} to oversee hydraulic and civil engineering surveys of the {{ill|Tone River|ja|利根川}} . == Births == * {{ill|Qianlong Emperor|ja|乾隆}} 10 (Gregorian {{ill|1760|ja|1760年}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ) – {{ill|Jiaqing Emperor|ja|嘉慶帝}} , 7th Emperor of the {{ill|Qing dynasty|ja|清}} (+ {{ill|1820|ja|1820年}} ). * {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1831|ja|1831st year }} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – {{ill|Ono Gohei|ja|小野五平}} , 12th {{ill|Meijin (shogi)|ja|名人}} in shogi. * {{ill|Tongzhi Emperor|ja|同治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1866|ja|1866年}} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Sun Yat-sen|ja|孫文}} , revolutionary and first {{ill|Provisional President of the Republic of China|ja|中華民国大総統}} (+ {{ill|1925|ja|1925年}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Japan)|ja|天正}} 12 (Gregorian {{ill|1584|ja|1584年}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ) – {{ill|Ashina Moritaka|ja|蘆名盛隆}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名}} (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year }} ). * {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|ja|正徳}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1715|ja|1715年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}} , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* {{ill|1639|ja|1639年}} ). * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|Enkyō}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1747|ja|1747年}} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ) – {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士}} (* {{ill|1665|ja|1665年}} ). == Commemorations == [[Category:Japanese historical events]] [[Category:Edo period]] [[Category:Shogunate officials]] [[Category:Sengoku period]] [[sn:October 6 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 6일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初六]] [[zh:十月初六]] [[en:draft:October 6 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Empress Kōgyoku|ja|皇極天皇}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|643|ja|643rd year }} {{ill|November 22|ja|11月22日}} ) – {{ill|Soga no Emishi|ja|蘇我Ezo}} arbitrarily grants the {{ill|purple cap|ja|紫冠}} to his son, {{ill|Soga no Iruka|ja|蘇我入鹿}} , making him Minister. * {{ill|Jishō (era)|ja|治承}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1180|ja|1180th year }} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} , having fled to {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国}} , enters {{ill|Kamakura|ja|鎌倉}} with the assistance of {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤}} and others. * {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 13 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1842|ja|1842nd year }} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} appoints {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} to oversee hydraulic and civil engineering surveys of the {{ill|Tone River|ja|利根川}} . == Births == * {{ill|Qianlong Emperor|ja|乾隆}} 10 (Gregorian {{ill|1760|ja|1760th year }} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ) – {{ill|Jiaqing Emperor|ja|嘉慶帝}} , 7th Emperor of the {{ill|Qing dynasty|ja|清}} (+ {{ill|1820|ja|1820th year }} ). * {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1831|ja|1831st year }} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – {{ill|Ono Gohei|ja|小野五平}} , 12th {{ill|Meijin (shogi)|ja|名人}} in shogi. * {{ill|Tongzhi Emperor|ja|同治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1866|ja|1866th year }} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Sun Yat-sen|ja|孫文}} , revolutionary and first {{ill|Provisional President of the Republic of China|ja|中華民国大総統}} (+ {{ill|1925|ja|1925th year }} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Japan)|ja|天正}} 12 (Gregorian {{ill|1584|ja|1584th year }} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ) – {{ill|Ashina Moritaka|ja|蘆名盛隆}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名}} (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year }} ). * {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|ja|正徳}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1715|ja|1715th year }} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}} , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* {{ill|1639|ja|1639th year }} ). * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|Enkyō}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1747|ja|1747th year }} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ) – {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士}} (* {{ill|1665|ja|1665th year }} ). == Commemorations == [[Category:Japanese historical events]] [[sn:October 6 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 6일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初六]] [[zh:十月初六]] [[en:draft:October 6 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Empress Kōgyoku|ja|皇極天皇}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|643|ja|643rd year }} {{ill|November 22|ja|11月22日}} ) – {{ill|Soga no Emishi|ja|蘇我Ezo}} arbitrarily grants the {{ill|purple cap|ja|紫冠}} to his son, {{ill|Soga no Iruka|ja|蘇我入鹿}} , making him Minister. * {{ill|Jishō (era)|ja|治承}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1180|ja|1180th year }} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} , having fled to {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国}} , enters {{ill|Kamakura|ja|鎌倉}} with the assistance of {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤}} and others. * {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 13 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1842|ja|1842nd year }} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} appoints {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} to oversee hydraulic and civil engineering surveys of the {{ill|Tone River|ja|利根川}} . == Births == * {{ill|Qianlong Emperor|ja|乾隆}} 10 (Gregorian {{ill|1760|ja|1760th year }} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ) – {{ill|Jiaqing Emperor|ja|嘉慶帝}} , 7th Emperor of the {{ill|Qing dynasty|ja|清}} (+ {{ill|1820|ja|1820th year }} ). * {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1831|ja|1831st year }} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – {{ill|Ono Gohei|ja|小野五平}} , 12th {{ill|Meijin (shogi)|ja|名人}} in shogi. * {{ill|Tongzhi Emperor|ja|同治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1866|ja|1866th year }} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Sun Yat-sen|ja|孫文}} , revolutionary and first {{ill|Provisional President of the Republic of China|ja|中華民国大総統}} (+ {{ill|1925|ja|1925th year }} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Japan)|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 12 (Gregorian {{ill|1584|ja|1584th year }} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ) – {{ill|Ashina Moritaka|ja|蘆名盛隆}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名}} (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year }} ). * {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|ja|正徳}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1715|ja|1715th year }} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}} , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* {{ill|1639|ja|1639th year }} ). * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|Enkyō}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1747|ja|1747th year }} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ) – {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士}} (* {{ill|1665|ja|1665th year }} ). == Commemorations == == Events == * {{ill|Empress Kōgyoku|ja|皇極天皇}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|643|ja|643rd year }} {{ill|November 22|ja|11月22日}} ) – {{ill|Soga no Emishi|ja|蘇我Ezo}} arbitrarily grants the {{ill|purple cap|ja|紫冠}} to his son, {{ill|Soga no Iruka|ja|蘇我入鹿}} , making him Minister. * {{ill|Jishō (era)|ja|治承}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1180|ja|1180th year }} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} , having fled to {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国}} , enters {{ill|Kamakura|ja|鎌倉}} with the assistance of {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤}} and others. * {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 13 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1842|ja|1842nd year }} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} appoints {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} to oversee hydraulic and civil engineering surveys of the {{ill|Tone River|ja|利根川}} . == Births == * {{ill|Qianlong Emperor|ja|乾隆}} 10 (Gregorian {{ill|1760|ja|1760th year }} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ) – {{ill|Jiaqing Emperor|ja|嘉慶帝}} , 7th Emperor of the {{ill|Qing dynasty|ja|清}} (+ {{ill|1820|ja|1820th year }} ). * {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1831|ja|1831st year }} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – {{ill|Ono Gohei|ja|小野五平}} , 12th {{ill|Meijin (shogi)|ja|名人}} in shogi. * {{ill|Tongzhi Emperor|ja|同治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1866|ja|1866th year }} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Sun Yat-sen|ja|孫文}} , revolutionary and first {{ill|Provisional President of the Republic of China|ja|中華民国大総統}} (+ {{ill|1925|ja|1925th year }} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Japan)|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 12 (Gregorian {{ill|1584|ja|1584th year }} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ) – {{ill|Ashina Moritaka|ja|蘆名盛隆}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名}} (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year }} ). * {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|ja|正徳}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1715|ja|1715th year }} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}} , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* {{ill|1639|ja|1639th year }} ). * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|Enkyō}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1747|ja|1747th year }} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ) – {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士}} (* {{ill|1665|ja|1665th year }} ). == Commemorations == {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名}} (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year }} ). * {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|ja|正徳}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1715|ja|1715th year }} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}} , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* {{ill|1639|ja|1639th year }} ). * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|Enkyō}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1747|ja|1747th year }} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ) – {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士}} (* {{ill|1665|ja|1665th year }} ). == Commemorations == [[sn:October 6 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 6일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初六]] [[zh:十月初六]] [[en:draft:October 6 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Empress Kōgyoku|ja|皇極天皇}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|643|ja|643rd year }} {{ill|November 22|ja|11月22日}} ) – {{ill|Soga no Emishi|ja|蘇我Ezo}} arbitrarily grants the {{ill|purple cap|ja|紫冠}} to his son, {{ill|Soga no Iruka|ja|蘇我入鹿}} , making him Minister. * {{ill|Jishō (era)|ja|治承}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1180|ja|1180th year }} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} , having fled to {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国}} , enters {{ill|Kamakura|ja|鎌倉}} with the assistance of {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤}} and others. * {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 13 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1842|ja|1842nd year }} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} appoints {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} to oversee hydraulic and civil engineering surveys of the {{ill|Tone River|ja|利根川}} . == Births == * {{ill|Qianlong Emperor|ja|乾隆}} 10 (Gregorian {{ill|1760|ja|1760th year }} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ) – {{ill|Jiaqing Emperor|ja|嘉慶帝}} , 7th Emperor of the {{ill|Qing dynasty|ja|清}} (+ {{ill|1820|ja|1820th year }} ). * {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1831|ja|1831st year }} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – {{ill|Ono Gohei|ja|小野五平}} , 12th {{ill|Meijin (shogi)|ja|名人}} in shogi. * {{ill|Tongzhi Emperor|ja|同治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1866|ja|1866th year }} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Sun Yat-sen|ja|孫文}} , revolutionary and first {{ill|Provisional President of the Republic of China|ja|中華民国大総統}} (+ {{ill|1925|ja|1925th year }} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Japan)|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 12 (Gregorian {{ill|1584|ja|1584th year }} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ) – {{ill|Ashina Moritaka|ja|蘆名盛隆}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名}} (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year }} ). * {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|ja|正徳}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1715|ja|1715th year }} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}} , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* {{ill|1639|ja|1639th year }} ). * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|Enkyō}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1747|ja|1747th year }} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ) – {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士}} (* {{ill|1665|ja|1665th year }} ). == Commemorations == revision.text:
[[cdo:10 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初六]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Empress Kōgyoku|ja|皇極天皇}} 2 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|643|ja|643rd year }} {{ill|November 22|ja|11月22日}} ) – {{ill|Soga no Emishi|ja|蘇我Ezo}} arbitrarily grants the {{ill|purple cap|ja|紫冠}} to his son, {{ill|Soga no Iruka|ja|蘇我入鹿}} , making him Minister. * {{ill|Jishō (era)|ja|治承}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1180|ja|1180th year }} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} , having fled to {{ill|Awa Province|ja|安房国}} , enters {{ill|Kamakura|ja|鎌倉}} with the assistance of {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤}} and others. * {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 13 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1842|ja|1842nd year }} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate}} appoints {{ill|Ninomiya Sontoku|ja|二宮尊徳}} to oversee hydraulic and civil engineering surveys of the {{ill|Tone River|ja|利根川}} . == Births == * {{ill|Qianlong Emperor|ja|乾隆}} 10 (Gregorian {{ill|1760|ja|1760th year }} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ) – {{ill|Jiaqing Emperor|ja|嘉慶帝}} , 7th Emperor of the {{ill|Qing dynasty|ja|清}} (+ {{ill|1820|ja|1820th year }} ). * {{ill|Tenpō (era)|ja|天保}} 2 (Gregorian {{ill|1831|ja|1831st year }} {{ill|November 9|ja|11月9日}} ) – {{ill|Ono Gohei|ja|小野五平}} , 12th {{ill|Meijin (shogi)|ja|名人}} in shogi. * {{ill|Tongzhi Emperor|ja|同治}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1866|ja|1866th year }} {{ill|November 12|ja|11月12日}} ) – {{ill|Sun Yat-sen|ja|孫文}} , revolutionary and first {{ill|Provisional President of the Republic of China|ja|中華民国大総統}} (+ {{ill|1925|ja|1925th year }} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Tenshō (Japan)|ja|天正|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)|lt=Tenshō Era}} 12 (Gregorian {{ill|1584|ja|1584th year }} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ) – {{ill|Ashina Moritaka|ja|蘆名盛隆}} , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名}} (* {{ill|1561|ja|1561st year }} ). * {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|ja|正徳}} 5 (Gregorian {{ill|1715|ja|1715th year }} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Shibukawa Harumi|ja|渋川春海}} , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* {{ill|1639|ja|1639th year }} ). * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|Enkyō}} 4 (Gregorian {{ill|1747|ja|1747th year }} {{ill|November 8|ja|11月8日}} ) – {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士}} (* {{ill|1665|ja|1665th year }} ). == Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|5|10|7|9|6|11|10|1006}}
[[cdo:10 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初六]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初六]]

revision.text:
{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月6日'''（きゅうれきじゅうがつむいか）は[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の6日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[斉明天皇|皇極天皇]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[643年]][[11月22日]]） - [[蘇我蝦夷]]が子・[[蘇我入鹿|入鹿]]に勝手に紫冠を授け大臣とする * [[治承]]4年（ユリウス暦[[1180年]][[10月26日]]） - [[安房国|安房]]に逃れた[[源頼朝]]が、[[千葉常胤]]らの助勢を得て鎌倉に入る * [[天保]]13年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1842年]][[11月8日]]） - [[江戸幕府]]が[[二宮尊徳]]を利根川の水利土木調査の為の御普請役格に登用
== 誕生日 == * [[乾隆]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1760年]][[11月13日]]） - [[嘉慶帝]]、[[清]]の7代皇帝（+ [[1820年]]） * [[天保]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1831年]][[11月9日]]） - [[小野五平]]、将棋の十二世名人 * [[同治]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1866年]][[11月12日]]） - [[孫文]]、革命家・[[中華民国]]大総統（+ [[1925年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天正]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1584年]][[11月8日]]） - [[蘆名盛隆]]、[[戦国大名]]（* [[1561年]]） * [[正徳 (日本)|正徳]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1715年]][[11月1日]]） - [[渋川春海]]（2代目安井算哲）、天文暦学者（* [[1639年]]） * [[延享]]4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1747年]][[11月8日]]） - [[寺坂信行]]、[[赤穂浪士]]（* [[1665年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|5|10|7|9|6|11|10|1006}}

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[10月6日 (旧暦)]] to [[October 6 (Lunisolar)]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import

([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:643|643]] [[:en:November 22|November 22]] ) – {{ill|Soga no Emishi|ja|蘇我Ezo|1=Soga no Emishi|2=ja|3=蘇我蝦夷|WD=Q1292368|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Soga no Emishi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1292368}} arbitrarily grants the {{ill|purple cap|ja|紫冠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/purple cap|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to his son, [[:en:Soga no Iruka|Soga no Iruka]] , making him Minister. * [[:en:Jishō|Jishō (era)]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] , having fled to [[:en:Awa Province (Chiba)|Awa Province]] , enters {{ill|Kamakura|ja|鎌倉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamakura|1=Kamakura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939227}} with the assistance of {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiba Tsunetane|1=Chiba Tsunetane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11406057}} and others. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō (era)]] 13 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} appoints [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] to oversee hydraulic and civil engineering surveys of the [[:en:Tone River|Tone River]] . == Births == * {{ill|Qianlong Emperor|ja|乾隆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Qianlong Emperor|1=Qianlong Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1077532}} 10 (Gregorian [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ) – [[:en:Jiaqing Emperor|Jiaqing Emperor]] , 7th Emperor of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing dynasty]] (+ [[:en:1820|1820]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō (era)]] 2 (Gregorian [[:en:1831|1831]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ) – {{ill|Ono Gohei|ja|小野五平|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Gohei|1=Gohei Ono|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11463910}} , 12th {{ill|Meijin (shogi)|ja|名人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meijin (shogi)|1=Meijin (shogi)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q13583292}} in shogi. * {{ill|Tongzhi Emperor|ja|同治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tongzhi Emperor|1=Tongzhi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135837}} 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1866|1866]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – [[:en:Sun Yat-sen|Sun Yat-sen]] , revolutionary and first {{ill|Provisional President of the Republic of China|ja|中華民国大総統|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Provisional President of the Republic of China|1=Great President of the Republic of China|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q837221}} (+ [[:en:1925|1925]] ). == Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 12 (Gregorian [[:en:1584|1584]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ) – [[:en:Ashina Moritaka|Ashina Moritaka]] , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyo|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5384684}} (* [[:en:1561|1561]] ). * [[:en:正德|Shōtoku (era)]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1715|1715]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – [[:en:Shibukawa Shunkai|Shibukawa Harumi]] , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasui Santetsu|1=Yasui Santetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11450234}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* [[:en:1639|1639]] ). * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} 4 (Gregorian [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ) – {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Terazaka Nobuyuki|1=Terasaka Kichiemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11457748}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Forty-seven rōnin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 赤穂事件の人物一覧|1=Forty-seven Ronin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3136847}} (* [[:en:1665|1665]] ). == Commemorations ==

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 6일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月初六]][[zh:十月初六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840129]] Wikidata name: 6th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 6|qq=October 6}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 6일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Empress Kōgyoku|ja|皇極天皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Kōgyoku|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 斉明天皇|1=Kōgyoku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q235296}} 2 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:643|643]] [[:en:November 22|November 22]] ) – {{ill|Soga no Emishi|ja|蘇我Ezo|1=Soga no Emishi|2=ja|3=蘇我蝦夷|WD=Q1292368|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Soga no Emishi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1292368}} arbitrarily grants the {{ill|purple cap|ja|紫冠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/purple cap|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to his son, [[:en:Soga no Iruka|Soga no Iruka]] , making him Minister. * [[:en:Jishō|Jishō (era)]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] , having fled to [[:en:Awa Province (Chiba)|Awa Province]] , enters {{ill|Kamakura|ja|鎌倉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamakura|1=Kamakura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939227}} with the assistance of {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiba Tsunetane|1=Chiba Tsunetane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11406057}} and others. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō (era)]] 13 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} appoints [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] to oversee hydraulic and civil engineering surveys of the [[:en:Tone River|Tone River]] . == Births == * {{ill|Qianlong Emperor|ja|乾隆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Qianlong Emperor|1=Qianlong Gohei|1=Gohei Ono|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11463910}} , 12th {{ill|Meijin (shogi)|ja|名人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meijin (shogi)|1=Meijin (shogi)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q13583292}} in shogi. * {{ill|Tongzhi Emperor|ja|同治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tongzhi Emperor|1=Tongzhi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135837}} 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1866|1866]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – [[:en:Sun Yat-sen|Sun Yat-sen]] , revolutionary and first {{ill|Provisional President of the Republic of China|ja|中華民国大総統|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Provisional President of the Republic of China|1=Great President of the Republic of China|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q837221}} (+ [[:en:1925|1925]] ). == Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 12 (Gregorian [[:en:1584|1584]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ) – [[:en:Ashina Moritaka|Ashina Moritaka]] , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyo|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5384684}} (* [[:en:1561|1561]] ). * [[:en:正德|Shōtoku (era)]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1715|1715]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – [[:en:Shibukawa Shunkai|Shibukawa Harumi]] , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasui Santetsu|1=Yasui Santetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11450234}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* [[:en:1639|1639]] ). * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} 4 (Gregorian [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ) – {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Terazaka Nobuyuki|1=Terasaka Kichiemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11457748}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Forty-seven rōnin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 赤穂事件の人物一覧|1=Forty-seven Ronin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3136847}} (* [[:en:1665|1665]] ). == Commemorations ==

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 6일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月初六]][[zh:十月初六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840129]] Wikidata name: 6th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 6|qq=October 6}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 6일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Empress Kōgyoku|ja|皇極天皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Kōgyoku|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 斉明天皇|1=Kōgyoku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q235296}} 2 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:643|643]] [[:en:November 22|November 22]] ) – {{ill|Soga no Emishi|ja|蘇我Ezo|1=Soga no Emishi|2=ja|3=蘇我蝦夷|WD=Q1292368|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Soga no Emishi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1292368}} arbitrarily grants the {{ill|purple cap|ja|紫冠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/purple cap|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to his son, [[:en:Soga no Iruka|Soga no Iruka]] , making him Minister. * [[:en:Jishō|Jishō (era)]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] , having fled to [[:en:Awa Province (Chiba)|Awa Province]] , enters {{ill|Kamakura|ja|鎌倉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamakura|1=Kamakura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939227}} with the assistance of {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiba Tsunetane|1=Chiba Tsunetane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11406057}} and others. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō (era)]] 13 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} appoints [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] to oversee hydraulic and civil engineering surveys of the [[:en:Tone River|Tone River]] . == Births == * {{ill|Qianlong Emperor|ja|乾隆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Qianlong Emperor|1=Qianlong Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1077532}} 10 (Gregorian [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ) – [[:en:Jiaqing Emperor|Jiaqing Emperor]] , 7th Emperor of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing dynasty]] (+ [[:en:1820|1820]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō (era)]] 2 (Gregorian [[:en:1831|1831]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ) – {{ill|Ono Gohei|ja|小野五平|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Gohei|1=Gohei Ono|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11463910}} , 12th {{ill|Meijin (shogi)|ja|名人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meijin (shogi)|1=Meijin (shogi)|comment=changed title based on China|ja|中華民国大総統|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Provisional President of the Republic of China|1=Great President of the Republic of China|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q837221}} (+ [[:en:1925|1925]] ). == Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 12 (Gregorian [[:en:1584|1584]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ) – [[:en:Ashina Moritaka|Ashina Moritaka]] , <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 6일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月初六]][[zh:十月初六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840129]] Wikidata name: 6th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 6|qq=October 6}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 6일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Empress Kōgyoku|ja|皇極天皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Kōgyoku|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 斉明天皇|1=Kōgyoku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q235296}} 2 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:643|643]] [[:en:November 22|November 22]] ) – {{ill|Soga no Emishi|ja|蘇我Ezo|1=Soga no Emishi|2=ja|3=蘇我蝦夷|WD=Q1292368|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Soga no Emishi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1292368}} arbitrarily grants the {{ill|purple cap|ja|紫冠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/purple cap|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to his son, [[:en:Soga no Iruka|Soga no Iruka]] , making him Minister. * [[:en:Jishō|Jishō (era)]] 4 (Julian [[:en:1180|1180]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]] ) – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] , having fled to [[:en:Awa Province (Chiba)|Awa Province]] , enters {{ill|Kamakura|ja|鎌倉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamakura|1=Kamakura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939227}} with the assistance of {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiba Tsunetane|1=Chiba Tsunetane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11406057}} and others. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō (era)]] 13 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1842|1842]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ) – The {{ill|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} appoints [[:en:Ninomiya Sontoku|Ninomiya Sontoku]] to oversee hydraulic and civil engineering surveys of the [[:en:Tone River|Tone River]] . == Births == * {{ill|Qianlong Emperor|ja|乾隆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Qianlong Emperor|1=Qianlong Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1077532}} 10 (Gregorian [[:en:1760|1760]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ) – [[:en:Jiaqing Emperor|Jiaqing Emperor]] , 7th Emperor of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing dynasty]] (+ [[:en:1820|1820]] ). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō (era)]] 2 (Gregorian [[:en:1831|1831]] [[:en:November 9|November 9]] ) – {{ill|Ono Gohei|ja|小野五平|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ono Gohei|1=Gohei Ono|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11463910}} , 12th {{ill|Meijin (shogi)|ja|名人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meijin (shogi)|1=Meijin (shogi)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q13583292}} in shogi. * {{ill|Tongzhi Emperor|ja|同治|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tongzhi Emperor|1=Tongzhi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135837}} 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1866|1866]] [[:en:November 12|November 12]] ) – [[:en:Sun Yat-sen|Sun Yat-sen]] , revolutionary and first {{ill|Provisional President of the Republic of China|ja|中華民国大総統|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Provisional President of the Republic of China|1=Great President of the Republic of China|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q837221}} (+ [[:en:1925|1925]] ). == Deaths == * [[:en:Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 12 (Gregorian [[:en:1584|1584]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ) – [[:en:Ashina Moritaka|Ashina Moritaka]] , {{ill|Sengoku daimyo|ja|戦国大名|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sengoku daimyo|1=Sengoku daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5384684}} (* [[:en:1561|1561]] ). * [[:en:正德|Shōtoku (era)]] 5 (Gregorian [[:en:1715|1715]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – [[:en:Shibukawa Shunkai|Shibukawa Harumi]] , also known as the 2nd {{ill|Yasui Santetsu|ja|安井算哲|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasui Santetsu|1=Yasui Santetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11450234}} , astronomer and calendrical scholar (* [[:en:1639|1639]] ). * {{ill|Enkyō (Japan)|ja|Enkyō|1=Enkyō|2=ja|3=延享|lt=Enkyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Enkyō (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1183728}} 4 (Gregorian [[:en:1747|1747]] [[:en:November 8|November 8]] ) – {{ill|Terazaka Nobuyuki|ja|寺坂信行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Terazaka Nobuyuki|1=Terasaka Kichiemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11457748}} , one of the {{ill|Forty-seven rōnin|ja|赤穂浪士|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Forty-seven rōnin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 赤穂事件の人物一覧|1=Forty-seven Ronin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q3136847}} (* [[:en:1665|1665]] ). == Commemorations ==

Emishi|ja|蘇我Ezo|1=Soga no Emishi|2=ja|3=蘇我蝦夷|WD=Q1292368|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Soga no Emishi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1292368}} arbitrarily grants the {{ill|purple cap|ja|紫冠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/purple cap|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to his son, {{ill|Soga no Iruka|en|Soga no Iruka|WD=Q736621|lt=Soga no Iruka}} , making him Minister. * {{ill|Jishō|en|Jishō|WD=Q1194671|lt=Jishō (era)}} 4 (Julian {{ill|1180|en|1180|WD=Q19702|lt=1180}} {{ill|October 26|en|October 26|WD=Q2953|lt=October 26}} ) – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|en|Minamoto no Yoritomo|WD=Q242800|lt=Minamoto no Yoritomo}} , having fled to {{ill|Awa Province (Chiba)|en|Awa Province (Chiba)|WD=Q1053044|lt=Awa Province}} , enters {{ill|Kamakura|ja|鎌倉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamakura|1=Kamakura|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10939227}} with the assistance of {{ill|Chiba Tsunetane|ja|千葉常胤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiba Tsunetane|1=Chiba Tsunetane|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11406057}} and others. * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō (era)}} 13 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1842|en|1842|WD=Q7625|lt=1842}} {{ill|November 8|en|November 8|WD=Q2990|lt=November 8}} ) – The
